title: Longest Substring Without Repeats
description:
Given a string `s`, return the length of the longest contiguous substring with all unique characters.

**The point**: naive O(n³) checks every substring. Sliding window + a Map of last-seen indices gets you to **O(n)**.
hints: Brute force: try every (i, j), check if substring i..j has all unique chars. O(n³).
Better: a sliding window. Extend right; when you hit a duplicate, retract left.
Use a Map to remember the most recent index of each character. Then 'retract left' is O(1).
